title: T-009 — SET-006 First Work Order Redirect Step (skippable)
prompt:
Implement SET-006 First WO Step page at `/onboarding/5` per PRD §14.3 step 5 + §14.4 SET-006. Soft-redirect to 04-PLANNING-BASIC create-WO with `?onboarding=true&return=/onboarding/6`. Skip button calls T-003 skipOnboardingStep(orgId, 5) then router.push('/onboarding/6').

Return handling: query `?onboardingComplete=true` advances state to step 6.

RED: `pnpm --filter web test -- onboarding-step5`.

pipeline_inputs.description: Soft-redirect to 04-PLANNING-BASIC create-WO; Skip allowed; first_wo timestamp NOT captured here (gap-backlog).
pipeline_inputs.details: Pattern mirrors T-008 with target route 04-PLANNING-BASIC.
acceptance_criteria: Given page render, when user clicks Skip, then skipOnboardingStep(orgId, 5) and navigation to /onboarding/6.
Given page render, when user clicks Create Work Order, then navigation to /04-planning-basic/wo/create?onboarding=true&return=/onboarding/6.
Given GET /onboarding/5?onboardingComplete=true, when page renders, then updateOnboardingState({current_step:6, completed_steps:[...,5]}) and redirect to /onboarding/6.
Given vitest+RTL covers above, when pnpm --filter web test runs, then 0 failures.
risk_red_lines: Do not capture first_wo_at — that is gap-backlog scope.
Do not bypass skipOnboardingStep when Skip is clicked.
